Arrington was last seen about six years ago on July 15, 2008, in Adak, according to a Missing Persons Bulletin released by troopers that year. The bulletin said Arrington had arrived in Adak only five days before. He had purchased a one-way ticket to the community on an Alaska Airlines flight. summary: Chugach National Forest's Resurrection Pass and Bean Creek Trail are spectacular enough, but a project to remove beetle-killed spruce is opening up more vistas -- and more wildlife habitat.

summary: The oldest ski team in the 50th annual Turkey Day Relay cross-country race in Fairbanks featured the youngest knees.

title: Senate Democrats' spokesman quits, accuses them of complacency
summary: Frank Ameduri, a veteran Democratic staffer who started as press secretary in July, urged the minority caucus to act more boldly and find a message it can stand behind, rather than spend its time “griping about the Republicans” who control the Legislature.

title: Hatcher Pass Road and recreation area remain closed due to avalanche danger
summary: Hatcher Pass Road remained closed late Friday because of high avalanche danger, according to the Hatcher Pass Avalanche Center, and the state announced a closure of the main recreational areas in Hatcher Pass.

title: The great thaw: Climate change has profound effects in Glacier National Park
summary: At high mountain altitudes where most glaciers are found, temperatures are rising faster than in the valleys below, with all signs pointing to still-higher increases in the decades ahead.

title: End of the line: Small town near the Arctic Circle braces for a historic influx of refugees
summary: The buses are coming. No one knows when, how many, or exactly who will be in them, only that they are coming -- buses filled with refugees who began their journeys thousands of miles away and will arrive any day now at their final destination, this remote town in the piney forest of eastern Finland.

title: When moose and motorcycle collide on an Alaska road
summary: A solid, sickening thump could be heard on impact, and left a motorcyclist wondering if her riding partner and husband was seriously hurt, or worse after a collision with an Alaska moose.

title: Anchorage removes park platform that drew misbehavior, but problems remain
summary: Some say the removal of a metal platform from Campbell Creek Park has reduced the numbers of drunken, aggressive people hanging out there. But others say the problem has shifted elsewhere.

title: Obama breaks his promise on frankenfish, and Alaskans will pay
summary: OPINION: No self-respecting alley cat would eat this monster, but salmon-salmon-eel gets FDA OK. Only Alaska wild gets a place at our table.

title: During Planned Parenthood shooting, a scene of fear and chaos at nearby shopping center
summary: When a gunman opened fire at a Planned Parenthood clinic here on Friday just before noon, he turned a snow-covered shopping center bustling with post-Thanksgiving traffic into a scene of chaos and fear.

title: 3 dead, 9 wounded during gunman's hours-long siege at Planned Parenthood clinic in Colorado Springs
summary: A gunman burst into a Planned Parenthood clinic and opened fire, launching several gun battles and an hours-long standoff with police as patients and staff took cover under furniture and inside locked rooms.
